channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: West Coast Eagles defeat GWS to end six-game losing streak with standout performances
item.description: West Coast Eagles finally broke their six-game losing streak with a thrilling 17-point victory over Greater Western Sydney at Optus Stadium. The standout performer was 21-year-old Harley Reid, who ama...

item.title: Suba East MP Millie Odhiambo Shows Off Dance Skills at Ramogi Night
item.description: During a lively Ramogi Night event, Suba East MP Millie Odhiambo kept the crowd entertained with her energetic dance moves. Known for her bold personality and nicknamed Bad Gal Millie, she arrived at ...

item.title: Kenya pushes to regulate digital assets and boost blockchain and crypto adoption
item.description: Kenya is making big moves to establish itself as Africa’s leading hub for blockchain and cryptocurrency. Government officials and private sector players are pushing for balanced regulations that will ...

item.title: Solution to Evan Birnholz’s May 17 Crossword Featuring Theater Plays
item.description: Evan Birnholz’s May 17 crossword, titled 'Play Ball,' is a clever puzzle that challenges solvers with a theatrical twist rather than focusing on baseball, as the title might initially suggest. The cro...

item.title: Investor in Anthropic and OpenAI highlights lack of Australian AI companies for investment
item.description: Eric Gao, chief executive of Boman Group, a fund manager specialising in artificial intelligence investments, has expressed concerns that Australia is missing out on the global AI boom. With the firm ...

item.title: South African Filmmakers Shine at 2026 Cannes Film Festival
item.description: At the 79th Cannes International Film Festival in France, South African filmmakers are making a strong impression, signalling a shift in global cinema with African voices taking centre stage. Cape Tow...

item.title: NHS tribunal ruling could lead to numerous claims over single-sex facilities policy
item.description: A recent Leeds Employment Tribunal ruling has highlighted potential widespread discrimination within the NHS regarding its policies on single-sex facilities. An NHS employee successfully claimed that ...

item.title: New Calcium-Copper-Silicon Clathrate Discovered in Trinitite from 1945 Trinity Nuclear Test
item.description: During the Trinity nuclear test on July 16, 1945, the first detonation of an atomic bomb in New Mexico, extreme conditions led to the spontaneous formation of a novel material never before seen in nat...

item.title: Indian Space-Tech Companies Forge Partnerships with European Firms in Italy
item.description: India’s space promotion and regulatory body, IN-SPACe, led a delegation of nine Indian space-tech companies to participate in the Space Meetings Veneto 2026 in Venice, Italy. The event, organised by A...

item.title: Heavy Rain Causes Flooding in Quezon City
item.description: Quezon City experienced significant flooding after heavy rains swept through various parts of the area. Streets, including Mariveles Street in La Loma, were inundated, causing inconvenience for reside...

item.title: Addressing Canada's Tree Deficit: Strategies for Rebuilding Resilient Forests
item.description: Canada is facing a significant loss of its forest cover, with recent analyses estimating 7.35 billion trees lost due to wildfires, pests, and human activity. The boreal forest, which spans coast to co...

item.title: Paris Fury Shares Moments from Daughter Venezuela's Wedding Day
item.description: Paris Fury expressed immense pride in her daughter Venezuela on the morning of her wedding to Noah Price. The 16-year-old bride was pictured in elegant white satin pyjamas paired with a dramatic tulle...

item.title: Former North West Premier Bushy Maape Dies After Short Illness
item.description: Bushy Maape, former premier of the North West and veteran of the liberation struggle, has passed away at the age of 68 following a brief illness. He died on Saturday in Johannesburg, surrounded by his...

item.title: Carling Black Label campaign honours unsung heroes keeping South African and world football running ahead of 2026 FIFA World Cup
item.description: As excitement grows for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, Carling Black Label has launched a new campaign that shifts focus from famous players to the many unsung workers who make football matches possible. Br...

item.title: Driver Escapes Kidnapping as Gunmen Abduct Seven Passengers on Abuja-Kogi Road
item.description: One serious wahala happen for Kogi State yesterday as some gunmen block road dey kidnap passengers from bus wey dey go Abuja. According to one Instagram user, Ominyimotors, e driver wey dey deliver ca...

item.title: Government, Serengeti Breweries work together to boost Sustainable Development initiatives
item.description: The Tanzanian government and Serengeti Breweries Limited have recently strengthened their collaboration to support the country's Sustainable Development Agenda. The partnership focuses on promoting re...

item.title: KP Governor asks Centre for support, advises CM Afridi to prioritise governance over political protests
item.description: Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Governor Faisal Karim Kundi has urged the federal government to pay serious attention to the province's pressing issues, stressing that Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif should personal...

item.title: Manchester United Prepare for Nottingham Forest Clash as Carrick Nears Permanent Managerial Role
item.description: Manchester United host Nottingham Forest at Old Trafford in the Premier League, with the Red Devils needing only a point to secure third place and complete a remarkable season turnaround under interim...

item.title: Chito Victolero returns to lead Mapua’s rebuilding effort in NCAA
item.description: Si Chito Victolero ay muling bumalik sa collegiate basketball scene sa NCAA upang pamunuan ang Mapua Cardinals, dala ang malinaw na layunin na muling buuin at palakasin ang koponan. Bilang isang beter...

item.title: Reece Walsh shines and struggles as Broncos suffer heavy defeat to Warriors
item.description: Reece Walsh had a rollercoaster performance for the Brisbane Broncos during their 42-12 thrashing by the New Zealand Warriors at Suncorp Stadium in Magic Round. The fullback showcased his brilliance w...
